title: Zero In Bed Bug Trap - 5-Pack, Ready-To-Use, Poison-Free Treatment, Bed Bug Detector, Monitors Infestation
features: Bed bug traps provide poison and chemical-free control, killing bed bugs discreetly and effectively in the home; each trap lasts for up to 60 days
Trap and monitor bed bug activity in household bedrooms; use the traps as an early indicator of infestation or to check for repeat infestations
Bed bug traps are poison and chemical-free, containing a long-lasting adhesive within a folding, lock-tab design
The date mentioned on the product is manufacturer date
To eliminate bed bug infestations, use in conjunction with Zero In bed bug and dust mite killer spray (ZER968)
description: From the manufacturer 90-Day Knockdown Flying Insect Killer Bug Bat Electronic Fly Swat Strip Blind for Doors Mini Bug Bat Electronic Fly Swat Bed Bug Traps Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.4 out of 5 stars 2,363 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,871 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,786 4.2 out of 5 stars 2,011 3.8 out of 5 stars 2,363 Price — no data £8.46 £ 8 . 46 — no data — no data £6.90 £ 6 . 90 Description Provides up to 90 days of continuous, slow-release insect control, safeguarding indoor spaces of up to 30 cubic metres from flying pests. The Bug Bat delivers a powerful electric shock to zap flies, wasps, mosquitoes, and midges on contact, providing quick and effective pest control with just one touch. Our plastic strip blind effectively keeps flying insects at bay, ensuring a pest-free environment while still allowing fresh air to circulate in your home. The mini bug swatter is perfect to use indoors and outdoors, the Bug Bat is ideal for homes, offices, camping trips, BBQs, and picnics, keeping you protected from flying pests in any setting. Each trap provides up to 60 days of continuous bed bug protection. Designed for extended use, these traps work around the clock to catch bed bugs at all stages of their life cycle, from eggs to adults, helping to break the infestation cycle. Suitable for Indoor Indoor & outdoor Indoor Indoor & outdoor Indoor Format Diffuser Electronic Zapper Door strips Electronic Zapper Trap Easy to Use Remove the unit from the foil pack and set the time indicator for 3 months. Place it in a room up to 30m³, avoiding direct heat and strong drafts for best results. Press the button to activate and instantly zap insects. Secure over any doorway. Press the button to activate and instantly zap insects. Place them near beds, mattresses, or baseboards.
